items.title: Hinkal Protocol Exploited: $820K Laundered via Tornado Cash & THORChain
items.snippet: The attacker drained Hinkal through at least 14 identical 25,000 USDC withdrawals in under a minute, indicating an automated exploit. Privacy infrastructure protocol Hinkal, the zero-knowledge settlement layer recently integrated into the Polygon wallet for shielded stablecoin transfers, has suffered a security breach estimated at around $820,000, with the attacker laundering the proceeds through Tornado Cash and THORChain at a pace that left almost no window for intervention. The alarm was fir...
items.author: /u/Patient_Craft2195

items.title: Tether Freezes Over 130 Tron Wallets Tied to Terror Group
items.snippet: The U.S. Treasury added 134 crypto addresses tied to ISIS-K, the Islamic State's Afghan and Pakistani affiliate, to its sanctions list on July 1, and Tether froze all 131 on Tron, though three Monero wallets stay beyond reach. The post Tether Freezes Over 130 Tron Wallets Tied to Terror Group appeared first on Unchained .

sources.message: Public RSS URL is not stable; keep disabled unless a working public feed is confirmed.

coverage_notes: X/Twitter direct monitoring is not enabled because official API read access is paid. This dashboard avoids scraping or bypassing access controls.
Bluesky search uses the public endpoint when available. If it returns 403, add free-account BSKY_IDENTIFIER and BSKY_APP_PASSWORD repository secrets.
Reddit RSS and Mastodon public search may be rate-limited or incomplete depending on the platform.
YouTube search is optional and only runs when a free-quota YOUTUBE_API_KEY secret is configured.
